title_descriptor: 65% Polyester 35% Cotton, Chemical Resistant Fabric, 200 gr/m'2
page_title: 65% Polyester 35% Cotton, Chemical Resistant Fabric, 200 gr/m'2 - ArWoWear T4 Chem Pro - Ariteks
spec_line: 200 g/m², 65% Polyester 35% Cotton, VAT Dyed, Chemical Resistant, 2/1S Twill Fabric
description_blocks: ArWoWear T4 Chem Pro is 200 g/m², vat dyed, 65% polyester 35% cotton merserized workwear fabric.
It is usefull for outdoor summer hard working conditions.
Water and oil repellent (TS EN ISO 4920) function.
It is resistant to most industrial chemicals. (EN ISO 13034)

text_blocks.text: High visible, waterproof, flame retardant, antistatic, chemical resistant workwear fabrics. Protection Technical Textiles
High visible, waterproof, flame retardant, antistatic, chemical resistant workwear fabrics.
High visible, waterproof, flame retardant, antistatic, chemical resistant workwear fabrics.
High visible, waterproof, flame retardant, antistatic, chemical resistant workwear fabrics.
Ar Wo Wear T4 Chem Pro
200 g/m² , 65% Polyester 35% Cotton, VAT Dyed, Chemical Resistant, 2/1S Twill Fabric

ArWoWear T4 Chem Pro is 200 g/m², vat dyed, 65% polyester 35% cotton merserized workwear fabric. It is usefull for outdoor summer hard working conditions. Water and oil repellent (TS EN ISO 4920) function. It is resistant to most industrial chemicals. (EN ISO 13034) Technical Parameters Fiber 65% Polyester (PES) 35% Cotton (CO) EN ISO 2076 Yarn Warp:20/1Ne; Weft:20/1Ne EN ISO 2060 Weight 200 ±5 g/m² EN ISO 3081 Width 1600 ±20 mm EN ISO 3932 Tensile Strength Warp>800N; Weft>600N EN ISO 13934-1 Tear Strength Warp>20N; Weft>15N EN ISO 13937-2 Dimensional Change -3% < Length < +3% ; -3% < Width < +3% EN ISO 5077 Rubbing Fastness 4-5 EN ISO 105 X12 Perspiration Fastness 4-5 EN ISO 105 E04 Washing Fastness 4-5 EN ISO 105 C06 Dry Cleaning Fastness 4-5 EN ISO 105 D01 Hypochlorite Fastness 4-5 EN ISO 105 N01 Peroxide Fastness 4-5 EN ISO 105 N02 Hot Press Fastness 4-5 EN ISO 105 X11 Light Fastness 6-7 EN ISO 105 B02 Perspiration Light Fast. 4-5 EN ISO 105 B07 pH 6.0 EN ISO 3071 Azo Test No Azo Colorants. EN ISO 14362-1 Application Coveralls Quality Management Done ISO 9001 Chemical Resistant Yes EN ISO 13034 Technical Documents >> ArWoWear T4 Chem Pro Data Sheet Certificates EN ISO 13034 EN ISO 105 B02 EN ISO 105 C06 EN ISO 105 E04 EN ISO 105 N01 EN ISO 105 N02 EN ISO 105 X11 EN ISO 105 X12
